description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched gable roof covered in greenish, weathered shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a rough, stucco-like texture with visible wooden trim along the edges and base. A prominent stone chimney rises along one side of the building, constructed from dark, irregularly shaped stones. The front facade features a single wooden door and a small, shuttered window, while the opposite side has two similarly shuttered windows. The cabin sits on a slightly raised wooden platform, and there is no visible porch or veranda. The overall appearance suggests a simple, utilitarian structure suited for rural or forested environments.
description: A rustic, rectangular cabin with a steep gable roof, stone chimney, rough stucco walls, and shuttered windows. The structure sits on a wooden base and features a single front door.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a wooden door, a single shuttered window, and the stone chimney on the right side.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the full height of the stone chimney running up the wall, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two small, shuttered windows and the side of the stone chimney, with no doors present.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the gable end of the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch, covered in weathered shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Three small, rectangular, shuttered windows: one on the front facade and two on the rear, arranged asymmetrically with no windows on the sides
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door located on the front facade, offset to the right beneath the chimney
